summary: Completed testing of PWA install popup and camera-based QR scanning features. All PWA assets (manifest.json, sw.js, icons) are served correctly. Volunteer dashboard with Camera Scan and Manual Entry toggle modes is fully functional. Admin login and CSV download buttons still working.
passed_tests: PWA manifest.json served at /manifest.json with name 'SSNC', display 'standalone'
Service worker sw.js served at /sw.js with cache configuration
PWA icon-192.png served correctly (200 status)
PWA icon-512.png served correctly (200 status)
index.html has manifest link tag
index.html has apple-touch-icon link tag
index.html has apple-mobile-web-app-capable meta tag
InstallPrompt component added to App.js (renders when beforeinstallprompt fires)
Volunteer login with phone=1111111111, password=vol123 - SUCCESS
Volunteer dashboard loads with data-testid='volunteer-dashboard'
Camera Scan button visible (data-testid='mode-camera-btn')
Manual Entry button visible (data-testid='mode-manual-btn')
Camera mode shows 'Open Camera to Scan' button (data-testid='start-camera-btn')
Manual Entry mode shows text input (data-testid='volunteer-scan-input')
Manual Entry mode shows Scan button (data-testid='volunteer-scan-btn')
Switching between Camera and Manual modes works correctly
Event select dropdown present (data-testid='volunteer-event-select')
Volunteer logout button present (data-testid='volunteer-logout-btn')
Admin login with admin@ssnc.com / admin123 - SUCCESS
Admin User Management - Download Sample CSV button present (data-testid='download-sample-users-csv-btn')
Admin Business Categories - Download Sample CSV button present (data-testid='download-sample-categories-csv-btn')
API health endpoint returns ok
Volunteer events API requires authentication
Volunteer events API returns list when authenticated
critical_code_review_comments: InstallPrompt component only shows when browser fires 'beforeinstallprompt' event - this is correct PWA behavior and won't show in headless browsers
QrScanner uses html5-qrcode library - camera won't work in headless browser but UI elements render correctly
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby warning in console (non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Created test event 'Test Event for Volunteer' for volunteer testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA features fully implemented: manifest.json, sw.js, icons, InstallPrompt component. Volunteer dashboard has Camera Scan (default) and Manual Entry toggle modes. Camera uses html5-qrcode library. QrScanner component has data-testid='start-camera-btn' for camera button and data-testid='stop-camera-btn' when camera is active. Manual mode has data-testid='volunteer-scan-input' and 'volunteer-scan-btn'. All admin CSV download features from iteration_3 still working.
